title: Human-Centred AI Design Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative and interconnected stages of designing AI systems with a human-centric focus, based on established guidelines.
relationships: A cyclical flow where each element informs the next, creating an iterative feedback loop. The process starts with 'Understand Context & User Needs', which feeds into all subsequent design considerations. The final stage, 'Protect Privacy & Security', loops back to re-inform the understanding of context, ensuring the process is continuous and adaptive.
